title: Hyperlocal Intent
subtitle: Redefining Indian search behavior through context-aware, vernacular-first, and intent-driven intelligent interfaces.
problem_statement: The current web search paradigm relies on linear keyword input which fails the diverse, low-bandwidth, and multilingual Indian demographic. Users struggle with 'Discovery Gap'—the inability to bridge search queries with immediate local offline availability, resulting in high cognitive load and search abandonment.

pillars.title: Vernacular Intent Bias
pillars.insight: Users prioritize voice input and localized script over formal English, seeking 'conversational' search results.

pillars.title: The 'Service-Gap' Anxiety
pillars.insight: Users frequently use search to validate offline service viability, fearing digital misinformation.

pillars.title: Data-Sensitive Navigation
pillars.insight: There is a deep-seated behavioral preference for 'lite' web experiences that preserve cellular data balance.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we design a search interface that prioritizes intent over keyword density for non-English speakers?
How might we integrate hyperlocal inventory into search results to provide immediate 'Actionability'?
How might we reduce latency and data-dependency for users in Tier 2/3 cities without compromising UI fidelity?

personas.name: Arjun Mehta
personas.quote: Sab kuch mil jata hai, par local dukaan ka address nahi (Everything is found, but the local shop address is missing).
personas.bio: Arjun manages a hardware store and uses the web to check market rates and vendor availability while on the move.

personas.name: Priya Sharma
personas.quote: Search result load time is like a test of patience. (Sahi waqt par load hona chahiye)
personas.bio: A power user who relies on search for academic resources and job listings, frequently switching between English and Hindi.

points.benefit: Lower friction for non-native English speakers

points.action: Unified search and local inventory lookup
points.benefit: Higher conversion from search to store visit

points.action: Dynamic UI based on signal strength
Conversational search summaries instead of lists

pivot.before: A high-bandwidth, generic list of text links that requires multiple clicks to find actionable local information.
pivot.pivot_logic: Moving from 'Information Retrieval' to 'Service Fulfillment' by injecting local context directly into the SERP.
pivot.after: A streamlined, contextual dashboard that displays map, price, and availability in the primary view.

annotations.title: Persistent Voice Toggle
annotations.rationale: Keeps the conversational interface reachable at all times, reducing keyboard input stress.

annotations.title: Local Inventory Cards
annotations.rationale: Immediate validation of local store stock to satisfy the 'Service-Gap' anxiety.

annotations.title: Low-Data Mode Switch
annotations.rationale: Allows users to trigger stripped-down UI to maintain functionality in rural network areas.
